ruleBookInfo.name: h1 a@text
ruleBookInfo.author: h2 span:first-of-type a@text
ruleBookInfo.kind: {{(()=>{var status='';var updated='';var m=src.match(new RegExp('状态：([^<]+)<'));if(m)status=m[1].trim();m=src.match(new RegExp('更新：([^<]+)<'));if(m)updated=m[1].trim();return ['小说',status&&(updated?status+'：'+updated:status)].filter((item)=>item).join(',');})()}}

ruleContent.content:
{{(()=>{var getBody=(html)=>{var m=html.match(new RegExp('
]*>([\\\\s\\\\S]*?)
'));return m?String(java.htmlFormat(m[1])).trim():'';};var getNext=(html)=>{var m=html.match(new RegExp(']*href=\"([^\"]+)\"[^>]*>\\\\s*下一页\\\\s*'));return m?m[1].trim():'';};var toAbs=(u)=>{if(!u)return '';if(/^https?:\\/\\//.test(u))return u;var origin='https://www.biquge.tw';return origin+(u.charAt(0)=='/'?u:'/'+u);};var html=src;var out=[];var seen={};while(html){var body=getBody(html);if(body)out.push(body);var next=getNext(html);if(!next)break;next=toAbs(next);if(!next||seen[next])break;seen[next]=1;html=java.ajax(next);}return out.join('\\n');})()}}
